headline: Will High Dry Dock & Regulatory Costs Weigh On CCL's Earnings Growth?
summary: Carnival faces higher dry dock and regulatory costs in FY26, but mitigation efforts and steady yield growth are expected to support continued earnings expansion.

raw.headline: Will High Dry Dock & Regulatory Costs Weigh On CCL's Earnings Growth?
raw.summary: Carnival faces higher dry dock and regulatory costs in FY26, but mitigation efforts and steady yield growth are expected to support continued earnings expansion.

headline: Airbnb and 6 Other Stocks to Buy That Can Thrive Even if Interest Rates Don’t Fall
summary: Federal Reserve rate cuts have been a casualty of the war with Iran as oil prices rise.  22V Research’s Dennis DeBusschere screened for companies that sit in that sweet spot.  The former stand to rise the most as those data points show growth.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: Wondering if Royal Caribbean Cruises at around US$273 a share offers good value now, or if most of the opportunity is already priced in. The stock has had a mixed run, with a 1.6% decline over the last week and a 13.2% decline over the last 30 days, but a 23.3% return over the past year and a very large gain over three years. Recent headlines around the cruise sector have focused on ongoing demand for travel experiences and shifting expectations on consumer spending. These help frame how...

headline: Trump Ceasefire Plan Meets Iran's 5 Red Lines: How Long Can Markets Ignore The Reality Gap?
summary: Markets are pricing a U.S.-Iran ceasefire after Trump signaled progress, but Iran denies talks ever took place. The reality gap is widening.

raw.headline: Trump Ceasefire Plan Meets Iran's 5 Red Lines: How Long Can Markets Ignore The Reality Gap?

headline: Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) Sold After Strong Run as Growth Outlook Weakens
summary: Renaissance Investment Management, an investment management company, released its Q4 2025 “Large Cap Growth Strategy” investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The strategy faced a difficult fourth quarter of 2025, underperforming both the S&P 500, which gained 2.7%, and the Russell 1000 Growth Index as market leadership remained concentrated in […]
